languages.text: "Всего лишь приправа к основному блюду, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Этот яд пощекочет нервы, не более".
languages.translation_comment: Если играют этюды DW_CombatTechnique, DW_VenomResistance и DW_IzhdrigWeakness
Если играют этюды DW_CombatTechnique, DW_VenomResistance и DW_IzhdrigWeakness

languages.text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."
languages.original_text: "Всего лишь приправа к основному блюду, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Этот яд пощекочет нервы, не более".

traits.locale_text: "A mere appetizer for the main course, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."
"A mere appetizer for the main course, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."
"Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."
"Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."
"Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

languages.text: “不过是给这顿大餐加点调味料罢了，塞贝里安的继承人。这毒只会让神经发麻，没什么大不了的。”
languages.original_text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

traits.locale_text: “不过是给这顿大餐加点调味料罢了，塞贝里安的继承人。这毒只会让神经发麻，没什么大不了的。”

languages.text: "Yemeğin tuzu biberi Seberian'ın vârisi. Bu zehir sadece sinirleri karıncalandırır."
languages.original_text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

traits.locale_text: "Yemeğin tuzu biberi Seberian'ın vârisi. Bu zehir sadece sinirleri karıncalandırır."

languages.text: « Voyez cela comme une mise en bouche, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Le poison n'est là que pour vous engourdir, pas vous tuer. »
languages.original_text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

traits.locale_text: « Voyez cela comme une mise en bouche, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Le poison n'est là que pour vous engourdir, pas vous tuer. »

languages.text: «Son solo especias para la comida, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian. Este veneno solo escuece un poco, nada más».
languages.original_text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

traits.locale_text: «Son solo especias para la comida, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian. Este veneno solo escuece un poco, nada más».

languages.text: "Nur ein wenig Würze, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Das Gift kitzelt die Nerven, mehr nicht."
languages.original_text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

traits.locale_text: "Nur ein wenig Würze, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Das Gift kitzelt die Nerven, mehr nicht."

languages.text: 「食事に使うスパイスに過ぎない、シベリアの血を引く者よ。この毒は神経を刺激するだけだ」
languages.original_text: "Merely spice for the meal, heir of Seberian. This poison will tingle the nerves, nothing more."

traits.locale_text: 「食事に使うスパイスに過ぎない、シベリアの血を引く者よ。この毒は神経を刺激するだけだ」
